utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with all details required by its label: 
- property: Includes selected property with details and price (type, price, size, location, details, viewing) — fully specified.
- financing: Includes a financing solution with terms. It has purchase price, down payment, required mortgage, and status, but lacks concrete terms (interest rate, amortization, term length, monthly payment). Therefore not fully specified.
- legal_services: Includes legal services with costs (provider, package, estimated cost) — fully specified.
- moving_services: Includes moving arrangements with costs (provider, package, estimated cost) — fully specified.
- setup_services: Utility and setup services included (property survey package and cost; utilities package and cost) — fully specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown provided (breakdown lines and total) — fully specified.
Thus, 5 of 6 items are fully specified.
